tools.name: advanced_search_availability
tools.description: [DETAIL TOOL] Search appointment slots/cards. Use directly when clinic is known, or after search_available_clinics_map selection. Params: city (required), medical_service, doctor, clinic, start_day/end_day (YYYY-MM-DD). Date rules: 'tomorrow/domani' is the day after today; 'next week/prossima settim

tools.name: search_available_clinics_map
tools.description: [MAP TOOL] Discover clinics with availability and render them on map/sidebar. Params: city (required) + one of medical_service/doctor/clinic, optional date/time range. Date rules: 'tomorrow/domani' is the day after today; 'next week/prossima settimana' means the next calendar Monday-Sunday week, not

tools.name: search_suggest_city
tools.description: Find cities by partial name. Use when: User mentions unfamiliar city or you need coordinates. Returns: City names, coordinates, province, region. Follow: Use city name with advanced_search_availability.

tools.name: smart_suggest_service
tools.description: Smart service finder (text search + AI combined). Use when: User has vague symptoms/descriptions OR you need to explore service options before booking. Runs parallel search and AI prediction, merges results by relevance. Returns: Service names and IDs. Follow: Use service info with advanced_search_a

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: advanced_search_availability · Public sink: advanced_search_availability · Destructive: search_available_clinics_map.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: advanced_search_availability · Public sink: advanced_search_availability · Destructive: search_available_clinics_map

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
